basic_details.job_title: Tripura University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Internal Audit Officer and Assistant Registrar Posts
basic_details.post_name: Internal Audit Officer and Assistant Registrar
basic_details.short_information: Tripura University Internal Audit Officer and Assistant Registrar Notification 2026 has been released on 09 June 2026 on the official website of Tripura University. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the Tripura University Internal Audit Officer and Assistant Registrar Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired officer of Indian Audit & Account Service (IAAS), Bachelor's Degree in any discipline, Master's Degree in any discipline, At least 5 years of experience in Finance & Accounts in Pay Level 10 or equivalent
qualification.details: Internal Audit Officer (on contractual basis): Retired officer of Indian Audit & Account Service (IAAS). Bachelor's Degree in any discipline from any UGC recognized university; preferably Bachelor in Commerce (B.Com.). Assistant Registrar (on contractual basis): Retired officer of Central / State Government / Autonomous Organization / Statutory Body / University. Master's Degree in any discipline from any UGC recognized university; preferably Master in Commerce (M.Com.). At least 5 years of experience in Finance & Accounts in Pay Level 10 or equivalent Scale of Pay or above.

salary_details.pay_scale: Internal Audit Officer: Rs. 65,000/-; Assistant Registrar: Rs. 55,000/-
salary_details.details: Internal Audit Officer (on contractual basis): Rs. 65,000/- Assistant Registrar (on contractual basis): Rs. 55,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Tripura University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.tripurauniv.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Tripura University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Tripura University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Tripura University Recruitment 2026 is 29th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Tripura University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Internal Audit Officer and Assistant Registrar in the Tripura University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Tripura University Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for both the Internal Audit Officer and Assistant Registrar posts is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for Tripura University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Tripura University Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Internal Audit Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Internal Audit Officer post on a contractual basis is Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Registrar post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Registrar post on a contractual basis is Rs. 55,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Tripura University Recruitment 2026 will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What are the essential qualifications for the Assistant Registrar post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Registrar post, candidates should be retired officers of Central/State Government or equivalent, holding a Master's Degree and having at least 5 years of experience in Finance & Accounts in Pay Level 10 or above.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Tripura University, which is www.tripurauniv.ac.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.
